title: Maxim - LED Pearl Day Light Bulb - 5W Equivalent to 50 Watt - GU10
features: Superior Lifespan - An astonishing 25,000 hour average life giving you over a decades worth of use from our LED bulbs. (based on average use)
Wide Beam Angle - The wide beam angle of our LED Bulbs allows for the light to be showered over as much of the environment as possible.
description: These LED bulbs are a perfect replacement to your traditional lightbulbs giving you the same level of brightness while using 90% less energy. No need for an electrician; this bulb will fit any GU10 light fitting. Our 5w bulbs emit 360 lumens of light which is the equivalent of the traditional 50w light bulb
